caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact San Juan Today
caribbean.paragraph: San Juan is experiencing moderate northeast winds at 17 knots with wave heights reaching 3.7 feet and swell periods near 11 seconds from the northeast. Rain probability remains at 76% with lighter winds of 13 knots noted at Martinique, indicating wet conditions across the Eastern Caribbean today.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Marseille Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Marseille is experiencing strong conditions with sustained winds reaching 24 kt and waves up to 5.6 ft from the SSE. The port faces 100% rain probability, creating challenging conditions for maritime operations while Cadiz sees lighter winds at 19 kt and less intense weather.
